items.name: ng-utils
items.title: Utils (Angular)
items.description: Shared utilities for the Angular edition - cn() helper that merges Tailwind class names with conflict resolution (clsx + tailwind-merge).

items.name: ng-button
items.title: Button (Angular)
items.description: Button primitive for the Angular edition - 6 variants x 4 sizes, mirrors the shadcn/ui Button surface.

items.name: ng-scroll-area
items.title: Scroll Area (Angular)
items.description: Thin design-system styling layer over ngx-scrollbar - overlay scrollbars with Gremorie tokens (thin, rounded, --border-colored thumb).

items.name: ng-attachments
items.title: Attachments (Angular)
items.description: Composable Attachment* family - List, Item, Preview, Info, Name, Size, Remove, Empty - plus type and util files. Lays out file attachments for chat surfaces.

items.name: ng-prompt-input
items.title: Prompt Input (Angular)
items.description: PromptInput family for AI chat surfaces - state machine (ready -> submitted -> streaming -> error), drag-drop, paste-to-attach. Ships textarea, submit, toolbar, tools, action-menu, model-select sub-components that compose together.

items.name: ng-chart
items.title: Chart (Angular)
items.description: Headless chart engine for the Angular edition - chart-context, scales, axis, cartesian-grid, chart-frame, plus shape helpers (area, line, bar, scatter, pie, polar, radar, radial-bar). Shared base for every styled chart.

items.name: ng-area-chart
items.title: Area Chart (Angular)
items.description: Styled area chart - cumulative quantity over a continuous domain. Uses the ng-chart headless primitives.

items.name: ng-line-chart
items.title: Line Chart (Angular)
items.description: Styled line chart - trends over a continuous domain. Uses the ng-chart headless primitives.

items.name: ng-bar-chart
items.title: Bar Chart (Angular)
items.description: Styled bar chart - categorical comparison. Uses the ng-chart headless primitives.

items.name: ng-scatter-chart
items.title: Scatter Chart (Angular)
items.description: Styled scatter chart - x/y distribution. Uses the ng-chart headless primitives.

items.name: ng-pie-chart
items.title: Pie Chart (Angular)
items.description: Styled pie chart - part-to-whole. Uses the ng-chart headless primitives.

items.name: ng-radar-chart
items.title: Radar Chart (Angular)
items.description: Styled radar chart - multi-axis comparison. Uses the ng-chart headless primitives.

items.name: ng-radial-chart
items.title: Radial Chart (Angular)
items.description: Styled radial-bar chart - progress / gauge metaphor. Uses the ng-chart headless primitives.

items.name: rx-utils
items.title: Utils (React)
items.description: Shared utilities for the React edition - cn() helper that merges Tailwind class names with conflict resolution (clsx + tailwind-merge).

items.name: rx-button
items.title: Button (React)
items.description: Button primitive for the React edition - 6 variants x 8 sizes (including icon-only), `asChild` via Radix Slot. Mirrors the shadcn/ui Button surface.

items.name: rx-input
items.title: Input (React)
items.description: Input primitive for the React edition - single-line text field that adopts every native HTML `type`. Token-driven visual states.

items.name: rx-label
items.title: Label (React)
items.description: Label primitive built on `@radix-ui/react-label` (via `radix-ui` namespace). Pair with Input / form controls.

items.name: rx-select
items.title: Select (React)
items.description: Select primitive built on Radix Select - portalled, animated listbox, grouped items, scroll buttons. For short fixed lists (5-30 options).

items.name: rx-textarea
items.title: Textarea (React)
items.description: Multi-line text field that auto-grows via `field-sizing: content`. Use for free-form input where rows are unknown ahead of time.

items.name: rx-input-group
items.title: Input Group (React)
items.description: Composable input layout - wraps Input or Textarea with inline / block addons (icons, buttons, kbd hints). Drives focus + invalid + disabled states from the inner control. Enables the InputGroupButton composition that powers PromptInput.

items.name: rx-dropdown-menu
items.title: Dropdown Menu (React)
items.description: DropdownMenu family built on Radix DropdownMenu - actions menu with checkbox / radio items, separators, nested submenus, destructive variant.

items.name: rx-hover-card
items.title: Hover Card (React)
items.description: HoverCard primitive built on Radix HoverCard - non-interactive preview pane shown on hover. Use for link previews, profile cards, image teasers.

items.name: rx-dialog
items.title: Dialog (React)
items.description: Modal overlay anchored at viewport center, built on Radix Dialog. Use for focused decisions or short flows that need to interrupt the user context - confirmations, single-step forms, detail cards.

items.name: rx-sheet
items.title: Sheet (React)
items.description: Side-anchored panel for longer flows, built on Radix Dialog with a directional slide animation. Use for filters, settings panels, multi-section edit forms.

items.name: rx-popover
items.title: Popover (React)
items.description: Anchored interactive content overlay built on Radix Popover. Triggers on click and hosts interactive content - date pickers, mini forms, share menus. Distinct from Tooltip (hover-only) and HoverCard (hover previews).

items.name: rx-tooltip
items.title: Tooltip (React)
items.description: Short non-essential context on hover/focus, built on Radix Tooltip. Reserve for non-critical supporting information - keyboard shortcuts, icon labels, "what does this do" hints. Wrap your app root in `<TooltipProvider>` so all tooltips share a delay timer.

items.name: rx-command
items.title: Command (React)
items.description: Command palette primitive built on cmdk - inline picker (Combobox pattern) for keyboard-first navigation, plus CommandDialog for the canonical Cmd+K floating palette.

items.name: rx-alert-dialog
items.title: Alert Dialog (React)
items.description: Modal-blocking confirmation dialog built on Radix AlertDialog. Use for destructive confirmations and irreversible actions - the user must choose, no close-on-overlay or close-on-escape.

items.name: rx-context-menu
items.title: Context Menu (React)
items.description: Secondary action menu invoked via right-click, built on Radix ContextMenu. Power-user accelerator with the same shape as DropdownMenu (items, groups, separators, sub-menus, checkbox/radio variants).

items.name: rx-drawer
items.title: Drawer (React)
items.description: Bottom-up sheet for mobile contexts, built on vaul. Slides up from the bottom by default with native gesture support (drag-to-dismiss, momentum). Best for mobile confirmations, quick actions, simple forms.

items.name: rx-sonner
items.title: Sonner (React)
items.description: Toast notification root, wraps `sonner` with Gremorie tokens. Mount once at the app root - any descendant can fire `toast()` without an additional provider. For transient feedback only - for persistent in-flow messages use Alert; for critical confirmations use AlertDialog.

items.name: rx-date-picker
items.title: Date Picker (React)
items.description: Composite of Popover + Calendar wired with shadcn defaults. Single-mode by default. Lives in rx-overlays because it composes Popover (rx-overlays) with Button + Calendar (rx-forms).

items.name: rx-accordion
items.title: Accordion (React)
items.description: Vertically stacked, coordinated expandable sections built on Radix Accordion. Use when multiple sections share a common rhythm (FAQ, settings groups). For a single expandable region, use Collapsible.

items.name: rx-avatar
items.title: Avatar (React)
items.description: User identity glyph built on Radix Avatar - image with graceful fallback to initials or icon. Use for user surfaces (header, comments, mention chips, settings).

items.name: rx-badge
items.title: Badge (React)
items.description: Compact label for status, count, or category. Variants: default, secondary, destructive, outline. Supports `asChild` via Radix Slot for composition with links/buttons.

items.name: rx-card
items.title: Card (React)
items.description: Surface container for grouped content - composes CardHeader, CardTitle, CardDescription, CardContent, CardFooter. The base building block for dashboards, lists, and modal-less detail views.

items.name: rx-carousel
items.title: Carousel (React)
items.description: Horizontal slider built on embla-carousel-react - touch / drag, keyboard navigation, pagination dots, prev/next controls. Best for hero rotators, image galleries, onboarding tours.

items.name: rx-collapsible
items.title: Collapsible (React)
items.description: Single-section expandable region built on Radix Collapsible. Minimal building block for "show more" toggles, sidebar group expand/collapse, inline disclosures.

items.name: rx-separator
items.title: Separator (React)
items.description: Horizontal or vertical visual divider built on Radix Separator. Use sparingly - prefer spacing for visual grouping; reach for Separator only when a hard line carries semantic meaning.

items.name: rx-table
items.title: Table (React)
items.description: Styled wrapper over native HTML `<table>` - composable Table, TableHeader, TableBody, TableFooter, TableRow, TableHead, TableCell, TableCaption. Use for tabular data; pair with a data-grid library for sorting, filtering, virtualization.

items.name: rx-aspect-ratio
items.title: Aspect Ratio (React)
items.description: Reserves vertical space for media before content loads - thin wrapper over Radix AspectRatio. Use on responsive images, iframes, video embeds, and skeleton placeholders to prevent cumulative layout shift.

items.name: rx-resizable
items.title: Resizable (React)
items.description: Split panes with draggable handles - ResizablePanelGroup + ResizablePanel + ResizableHandle on top of react-resizable-panels. Use for dev tools and pro apps (editors, email clients, file managers); consumer surfaces almost always read better with fixed proportions.

items.name: rx-scroll-area
items.title: Scroll Area (React)
items.description: Themeable scroll container built on Radix ScrollArea - ScrollArea + ScrollBar. Reach for it when you need consistent scrollbar styling across OSs, or when the scrollbar lives inside a rounded card and the native bar would bleed outside the radius. Otherwise native scroll is fine.

items.name: rx-stack
items.title: Stack (React)
items.description: Vertical layout primitive - a `<div>` configured as flex column with consistent gap, align, and justify props. The right choice for any list flowing top-to-bottom (card contents, form sections, settings rows, vertical menus).

items.name: rx-alert
items.title: Alert (React)
items.description: Persistent in-flow feedback message - distinct from Sonner (transient) and AlertDialog (modal). Two variants (default, destructive); convey informational/success/warning via a leading icon rather than expanding variants.

items.name: rx-progress
items.title: Progress (React)
items.description: Determinate progress indicator (0-100) built on Radix Progress. Use when percent complete is known (uploads, multi-step forms, batch jobs); for unknown duration prefer Skeleton or a spinner.

items.name: rx-skeleton
items.title: Skeleton (React)
items.description: Placeholder block for loading states - a pulsing rectangle that reserves layout space so there is no shift when data arrives. Honors `prefers-reduced-motion` automatically.

items.name: rx-breadcrumb
items.title: Breadcrumb (React)
items.description: Hierarchical trail - composable Breadcrumb, BreadcrumbList, BreadcrumbItem, BreadcrumbLink, BreadcrumbPage, BreadcrumbSeparator, BreadcrumbEllipsis. Use to show the current location within a nested structure.

items.name: rx-menubar
items.title: Menubar (React)
items.description: Horizontal multi-menu bar built on Radix Menubar - desktop-style File/Edit/View menus with full keyboard navigation, sub-menus, checkbox and radio items.

items.name: rx-navigation-menu
items.title: Navigation Menu (React)
items.description: Top-level mega-menu built on Radix NavigationMenu - reveals secondary content panels on hover/focus. Use for site headers with grouped link clusters and feature highlights.

items.name: rx-pagination
items.title: Pagination (React)
items.description: Page navigation surface - composable Pagination, PaginationContent, PaginationItem, PaginationLink, PaginationPrevious, PaginationNext, PaginationEllipsis. Anchor tags by default; pass a custom component via PaginationLink for client-side routers.

items.name: rx-sidebar
items.title: Sidebar (React)
items.description: Composable app-shell sidebar - SidebarProvider, Sidebar, SidebarTrigger, SidebarMenu plus mobile drawer integration. Cookie-persisted collapsed state, keyboard shortcut, full keyboard navigation. The largest navigation primitive in the registry.

items.name: rx-tabs
items.title: Tabs (React)
items.description: Tabbed content switcher built on Radix Tabs - Tabs, TabsList, TabsTrigger, TabsContent. Use for sibling content panels that share a context (settings sections, profile pages).

items.name: rx-button-group
items.title: Button Group (React)
items.description: Cluster of related buttons that share a stroke. Composable ButtonGroup, ButtonGroupText, ButtonGroupSeparator. Horizontal or vertical, with optional inner Separator.

items.name: rx-calendar
items.title: Calendar (React)
items.description: Date grid built on react-day-picker - single or range selection, multi-month layout, weekday header, keyboard navigation. Pair with Popover for the canonical DatePicker pattern.

items.name: rx-checkbox
items.title: Checkbox (React)
items.description: Binary or tri-state checkbox built on Radix Checkbox. Use for multi-select lists, terms acceptance, settings toggles. For mutually exclusive choices use RadioGroup; for on/off use Switch.

items.name: rx-form
items.title: Form (React)
items.description: React Hook Form integration - Form, FormField, FormItem, FormLabel, FormControl, FormDescription, FormMessage. Wires field state, validation errors, and accessibility attributes.

items.name: rx-input-otp
items.title: Input OTP (React)
items.description: One-time password input built on input-otp - keyboard-driven, paste-friendly, slot-based. Use for 2FA codes, magic links, SMS verification.

items.name: rx-radio-group
items.title: Radio Group (React)
items.description: Mutually exclusive choice group built on Radix RadioGroup. Use for 2-7 distinct options. For binary on/off use Switch; for many options use Select.

items.name: rx-slider
items.title: Slider (React)
items.description: Range slider built on Radix Slider - single value or range (two thumbs), with step + min/max. Use for continuous values (volume, opacity, price range).

items.name: rx-switch
items.title: Switch (React)
items.description: Binary on/off toggle built on Radix Switch. Use for instant-effect settings (dark mode, notifications). For form fields that need explicit "save", prefer Checkbox.

items.name: rx-toggle
items.title: Toggle (React)
items.description: Two-state press-button built on Radix Toggle. Use for inline formatting controls (bold, italic) or visibility toggles. For multi-option clusters use ToggleGroup.

items.name: rx-toggle-group
items.title: Toggle Group (React)
items.description: Mutually exclusive or multi-select cluster of Toggle items, built on Radix ToggleGroup. Use for inline option pickers (text alignment, view mode, filter chips).

items.name: rx-prompt-input
items.title: Prompt Input (React)
items.description: PromptInput family for AI chat surfaces - state machine, drag-drop, paste-to-attach, status-driven Submit. Full Bridge parity: InputGroup composition (InputGroupButton + InputGroupTextarea), ActionMenu (dropdown), ModelSelector (select), attachment HoverCard previews, Speech button (Web Speech API), Command palette wrappers, Cmd+K floating palette via CommandDialog, and Tabs panels.

items.name: rx-shimmer
items.title: Shimmer (React)
items.description: Animated text shimmer for streaming/loading hints. Uses motion (Framer Motion v12) to slide a gradient across text. Tiny dependency-free primitive used by Reasoning and Plan to mark "thinking" steps.

items.name: rx-suggestion
items.title: Suggestion (React)
items.description: Horizontal scrollable pills of prompt suggestions. Each Suggestion is a rounded Button - the Suggestions wrapper handles overflow with a hidden ScrollArea scrollbar. Use above the prompt input for starter prompts.

items.name: rx-message
items.title: Message (React)
items.description: Atomic chat message with role-aware layout (user right-aligned, assistant left). Composable surface: MessageContent + MessageResponse (Streamdown markdown), MessageAttachments + MessageAttachment, MessageToolbar with MessageActions, and MessageBranch + MessageBranchSelector + MessageBranchPrevious/Next for regeneration alternatives.

items.name: rx-conversation
items.title: Conversation (React)
items.description: Scroll-to-bottom container for chat messages. Uses use-stick-to-bottom under the hood: ConversationContent stays anchored to the bottom while new messages stream in. ConversationScrollButton appears when the user scrolls up and snaps back when clicked. ConversationEmptyState renders centered placeholder content.

items.name: rx-reasoning
items.title: Reasoning (React)
items.description: Collapsible "thinking" block for visible chain-of-thought. Auto-opens while isStreaming, tracks duration, auto-closes after streaming ends. ReasoningContent renders Streamdown markdown; ReasoningTrigger uses Shimmer to mark live thought.

items.name: rx-chain-of-thought
items.title: Chain of Thought (React)
items.description: Step-by-step reasoning visualizer. ChainOfThoughtStep renders each thought with status (pending/active/complete), icon, and optional ChainOfThoughtStepBody. Supports nested ChainOfThoughtSearch with Badge result chips. Wraps a Collapsible for show/hide.

items.name: rx-task
items.title: Task (React)
items.description: Collapsible item list for an agent task. TaskTrigger shows status + summary, TaskContent holds TaskItem children. TaskItemFile renders inline file badges (e.g. "edited app.tsx"). Use for multi-step tool-use traces in the conversation.

items.name: rx-tool
items.title: Tool (React)
items.description: Tool-use trace block. ToolHeader shows the tool name + state Badge (input-streaming, input-available, output-available, output-error). ToolContent reveals ToolInput (JSON params), ToolOutput (formatted result), and ToolErrors. Built on Collapsible + CodeBlock.

items.name: rx-sources
items.title: Sources (React)
items.description: Citations cluster for RAG responses. SourcesTrigger shows "N sources" toggle, SourcesContent reveals the list. Each Source is a hyperlink with optional favicon. Use to attribute model output to retrieved documents.

items.name: rx-inline-citation
items.title: Inline Citation (React)
items.description: Footnote-style inline citation marker. Hovers reveal a HoverCard with a Carousel of source cards (InlineCitationCard, InlineCitationCardTrigger, InlineCitationCardBody, InlineCitationSource, InlineCitationQuote). Use inside MessageResponse to cite passages mid-sentence.

items.name: rx-plan
items.title: Plan (React)
items.description: Multi-step plan card with Shimmer-marked active step. PlanHeader + PlanTitle + PlanDescription describe the goal; PlanContent lists PlanStep items, each with status. PlanFooter holds CTA Buttons (approve / regenerate). Built on Card + Collapsible.

items.name: rx-checkpoint
items.title: Checkpoint (React)
items.description: Conversation savepoint marker. Renders a labeled bookmark with Separator on each side, plus a Tooltip explaining the state. Use to indicate revertable points in long agent runs.

items.name: rx-confirmation
items.title: Confirmation (React)
items.description: Approval prompt for tool calls. Wraps an Alert with ConfirmationRequest, ConfirmationDescription, and ConfirmationActions (Approve / Reject Buttons). Designed for human-in-the-loop tool gates - exposes approved/rejected callbacks with optional reason.

items.name: rx-context
items.title: Context (React)
items.description: Token usage display for AI conversations. ContextTrigger shows a circular progress glyph; on hover, ContextContent reveals input/output/total tokens, model max, and cost via tokenlens. Uses Progress + HoverCard.

items.name: rx-queue
items.title: Queue (React)
items.description: Pending message queue list shown above the prompt input. Each QueueMessage previews text + attachments; the user can dismiss or reorder. Built on Collapsible + ScrollArea.

items.name: rx-model-selector
items.title: Model Selector (React)
items.description: Floating model picker dialog. ModelSelectorTrigger opens a Dialog containing a full Command palette - CommandInput, CommandGroup, CommandItem, CommandShortcut, CommandSeparator. Use as a Cmd+K-style model switcher above the chat composer.

items.name: rx-artifact
items.title: Artifact (React)
items.description: Generic artifact card for AI-generated objects (code, doc, chart, image preview). ArtifactHeader + ArtifactTitle + ArtifactDescription + ArtifactActions + ArtifactAction + ArtifactClose + ArtifactContent. Use as the chrome wrapper for CodeBlock, WebPreview, Image, or any generated asset.

items.name: rx-code-block
items.title: Code Block (React)
items.description: Syntax-highlighted code surface powered by shiki. Lazy-loads codeToHtml on mount; exposes CodeBlockCopyButton with copy/copied state. Pass code + language, optional showLineNumbers; ships dark + light themes by default.

items.name: rx-web-preview
items.title: Web Preview (React)
items.description: Sandboxed browser preview for AI-generated sites. WebPreviewNavigation has back/forward/refresh, WebPreviewUrl is a navigable Input, WebPreviewBody renders an iframe with the current URL, and WebPreviewConsole (Collapsible) shows console logs and errors below.

items.name: rx-canvas
items.title: Canvas (React)
items.description: ReactFlow canvas surface for visual workflows / agent graphs. Pre-configured for pan-on-scroll, drag-selection, and deletable nodes via Backspace/Delete. Wraps @xyflow/react ReactFlow + Background.

items.name: rx-connection
items.title: Connection (React)
items.description: Animated bezier-curve connection line component for @xyflow/react. Renders a smoothly curved path with a circle terminator while the user is dragging a new edge. Pass as the connectionLineComponent prop on Canvas.

items.name: rx-controls
items.title: Controls (React)
items.description: Styled wrapper around @xyflow/react Controls (zoom in/out, fit view, lock). Pre-themed to match Gremorie - rounded, bordered, secondary-tinted buttons. Drop inside a Canvas as a child for floating zoom controls.

items.name: rx-edge
items.title: Edge (React)
items.description: Edge variants for @xyflow/react: Temporary (simple-bezier curve for in-progress connections) and Animated (gradient-flowing bezier for active flows). Register via edgeTypes={{ temporary: Temporary, animated: Animated }} on Canvas.

items.name: rx-node
items.title: Node (React)
items.description: Card-based node for @xyflow/react graphs. Wraps Gremorie Card + CardHeader/Title/Description/Content/Footer/Action to give each node consistent chrome. Accepts handles { target, source } booleans to declare which sides expose connection Handles.

items.name: rx-panel
items.title: Panel (React)
items.description: Floating positioned panel inside a @xyflow/react Canvas. Pre-themed - bordered, rounded, card-tinted, padded - for stacking minimap, layers, or context controls in a corner of the workflow.

items.name: rx-toolbar
items.title: Toolbar (React)
items.description: Per-node floating toolbar (NodeToolbar from @xyflow/react). Anchored below the node by default - use for context actions on selection (delete, duplicate, configure).

items.name: rx-image
items.title: Image (React)
items.description: Tiny wrapper that renders an Experimental_GeneratedImage (Vercel AI SDK) as a data-URI . Use to display model-generated images returned from generateImage() / experimental tool output.

items.name: rx-open-in-chat
items.title: Open in Chat (React)
items.description: Dropdown that opens the current page in an external chat (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, T3 Chat, ...). Provides preset providers (github, chatgpt, claude, gemini, t3) and accepts custom OpenInChatItem entries.
